comment: Pantheon Cron Job Manifest — all cron jobs managed by install-pantheon.sh

hermes_cron_jobs.name: Shared Context Digest
hermes_cron_jobs.prompt: Generate a shared context digest for Pantheon gods.

hermes_cron_jobs.name: Ichor Subconscious Engine
hermes_cron_jobs.prompt: Run the Ichor Subconscious Engine tick. The pre-run script (ichor_subconscious.py) already queried the event store. Process any new events and synthesize insights.

hermes_cron_jobs.name: Hades Nightly Consolidation
hermes_cron_jobs.prompt:
Run the Hades nightly consolidation pipeline (includes session prune as final step). python3 ~/pantheon/pantheon-core/hades/main.py --full

LAST STEP: hermes session prune --agent-id hermes-agent --days 14

hermes_cron_jobs.name: Athenaeum entity extraction (pre-Hades)
hermes_cron_jobs.prompt: Run the Athenaeum entity extraction pipeline. python3 ~/athenaeum/scripts/extract-entities.py

hermes_cron_jobs.name: Ichor Forge — Nightly Harness Analysis
hermes_cron_jobs.prompt: Run the Ichor Forge nightly analysis cycle. python3 ~/pantheon/pantheon-core/ichor/forge.py

hermes_cron_jobs.name: Morning Briefing
hermes_cron_jobs.prompt: Compose an energetic morning briefing for Konan delivered in fast-talking Hermes style.

hermes_cron_jobs.name: Thoth Dawn Patrol
hermes_cron_jobs.prompt: You are Thoth, Pantheon's intelligence analyst. Synthesize the raw dawn patrol findings above into a structured intelligence briefing. Group by category (Papers, GitHub Projects, MCP Servers, Model News). For each item, note relevance to Pantheon: HIGH (directly useful), MEDIUM (influence or idea), or LOW (interesting context). Flag anything that could be a threat or risk (vendor deprecation, security advisory). Write the final briefing to ~/athenaeum/reports/dawn-patrol/$(date +%Y-%m-%d).md

system_crontab_entries.description: The Fates event processing every 5 minutes

merged_jobs.name: Session Prune (cron + old)
merged_jobs.status: REMOVED — merged into Hades Nightly Consolidation as last step (2026-05-31)
